sentences.target: Ich habe noch Akku, aber ich habe kein Netz.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhaːbə nɔx ˈakuː, ˈaːbɐ ɪç ˈhaːbə kaɪn nɛts/

translations.de: Ich habe noch Akku, aber ich habe kein Netz.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhaːbə nɔx ˈakuː, ˈaːbɐ ɪç ˈhaːbə kaɪn nɛts/
translations.en: I still have battery, but I have no service.
translations.es: Todavía tengo batería, pero no tengo señal.
translations.fr: J’ai encore de la batterie, mais je n’ai pas de réseau.
translations.it: Ho ancora batteria, ma non ho campo.
translations.ko: 배터리는 아직 남았는데 신호가 안 잡혀요.
translations.ru: Батарея ещё есть, но связи нет.
translations.pt: Ainda tenho bateria, mas não tenho sinal.
translations.he: יש לי עוד סוללה, אבל אין קליטה.
translations.vi: Máy còn pin nhưng không có sóng.
translations.ar: هاتفي ما زال فيه شحن، لكن لا توجد تغطية.
translations.nl: Ik heb nog batterij, maar geen bereik.
translations.uk: Батарея ще є, але немає зв’язку.
translations.hu: Még van benne töltöttség, de nincs térerő.
translations.hi: मेरे फोन में अभी बैटरी है, लेकिन सिग्नल नहीं है।
translations.pl: Mam jeszcze baterię, ale nie mam zasięgu.
translations.el: Έχω ακόμα μπαταρία, αλλά δεν έχω σήμα.
translations.nb: Jeg har fortsatt batteri, men ikke dekning.
translations.id: Baterai masih ada, tapi tidak ada sinyal.
translations.sv: Jag har fortfarande batteri, men ingen täckning.
translations.ro: Încă am baterie, dar nu am semnal.
translations.cs: Ještě mám baterii, ale nemám signál.
translations.da: Jeg har stadig batteri, men intet signal.
translations.fi: Akussa on vielä virtaa, mutta ei ole kenttää.
translations.ja: まだ電池はあるのに、圏外だ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the first clause.
Finite present form of the lexical verb 'haben'; main predicate of the first clause.
Adverb modifying 'habe', indicating persistence/remaining amount ('still').
Common noun; direct object (accusative) of 'habe' referring to battery charge.
Coordinating conjunction linking two main clauses in contrast.
Personal pronoun in 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the second clause.
Finite present form of lexical 'haben'; main predicate of the second clause.
Negative determiner modifying 'Netz' (accusative), negating the existence of the object.
Common noun; direct object (accusative) of 'habe' ('no network/signal').

sentences.target: Im Netz habe ich das Rezept gefunden.
sentences.reading: /ɪm nɛts ˈhaːbə ɪç das ʁeˈt͡sɛpt ɡəˈfʊndən/

translations.de: Im Netz habe ich das Rezept gefunden.
translations.ipa: /ɪm nɛts ˈhaːbə ɪç das ʁeˈt͡sɛpt ɡəˈfʊndən/
translations.fr: J’ai trouvé la recette en ligne.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在网上找到了这个菜谱。
translations.vi: Tôi tìm được công thức trên mạng.
translations.nl: Ik heb het recept online gevonden.
translations.ja: ネットでレシピを見つけた。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition introducing a dative PP ('Im Netz').
Noun as object of the preposition 'im' (dative); the location ('in/on the network').
Auxiliary verb forming the present perfect with the participle 'gefunden'.
Personal pronoun, nominative; subject of the auxiliary 'habe' and the perfect construction.
Definite article modifying 'Rezept' (accusative).
Common noun; direct object (accusative) of the lexical verb 'gefunden'.
Past participle of 'finden'; lexical main verb completing the perfect construction.

sentences.target: Beim Tennis hängt das Netz schief.

translations.de: Beim Tennis hängt das Netz schief.
translations.en: At tennis, the net is crooked.
translations.es: La red de tenis está torcida.
translations.fr: Le filet de tennis est de travers.
translations.it: La rete da tennis è storta.
translations.pt: A rede de tênis está torta.
translations.vi: Lưới quần vợt bị treo lệch.
translations.el: Το δίχτυ του τένις είναι στραβό.
translations.ja: テニスのネットが傾いている。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'bei dem'; preposition introducing a dative PP ('Beim Tennis').
Common noun; object of the preposition 'beim' (dative), indicating the context/activity.
Finite present of 'hängen'; main predicate of the clause.
Definite article modifying 'Netz' (nominative).
Common noun; subject (nominative) of 'hängt'.
Adverb modifying 'hängt', describing the manner/state ('hangs crookedly').

sentences.target: Das Handy findet im Zug kein Netz.
sentences.reading: /das ˈhɛndi ˈfɪndət ɪm t͡suːk kaɪn nɛts/

translations.de: Das Handy findet im Zug kein Netz.
translations.ipa: /das ˈhɛndi ˈfɪndət ɪm t͡suːk kaɪn nɛts/
translations.en: The phone gets no signal on the train.
translations.es: El móvil no tiene cobertura en el tren.
translations.fr: Le téléphone n’a pas de réseau dans le train.
translations.it: Il telefono non prende in treno.
translations.zh-Hans: 手机在火车上没有信号。
translations.ru: В поезде телефон не ловит сеть.
translations.pt: O celular não tem sinal no trem.
translations.vi: Trên tàu, điện thoại không có sóng.
translations.ar: لا توجد تغطية للهاتف في القطار.
translations.nl: In de trein heeft de telefoon geen bereik.
translations.uk: У поїзді телефон не ловить зв’язок.
translations.hi: ट्रेन में फोन पर सिग्नल नहीं आता।
translations.pl: Telefon w pociągu nie ma zasięgu.
translations.el: Στο τρένο το κινητό δεν έχει σήμα.
translations.nb: Telefonen har ikke dekning på toget.
translations.id: Di kereta, ponsel tidak ada sinyal.
translations.sv: Telefonen har ingen täckning på tåget.
translations.ro: În tren, telefonul nu are semnal.
translations.da: Telefonen har ikke signal i toget.
translations.ja: 電車では携帯が圏外になる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article modifying 'Handy' (nominative).
Common noun; subject (nominative) of 'findet'.
Finite present of lexical verb 'finden'; main predicate, taking a PP and a direct object.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition introducing a dative PP ('im Zug').
Common noun; object of the preposition 'im' (dative), indicating location.
Negative determiner modifying 'Netz' (accusative), marking negation of the object.
Common noun; direct object (accusative) of 'findet' ('no network/signal').
